description.p: Morrigan Xanderreef was a revered Speaker of Spirits within Cnidaria and necromancer, known for his mastery of life and death and his ruthless political strategies.

A master of necromancy, Morrigan possessed a profound understanding of life, death, and arcane manipulation. His experiments were precise, calculated, and deeply scholarly—yet driven by a desire to rival the gods themselves.
Despite his intellect, Morrigan was flamboyant, arrogant, and indulgent. He reveled in attention, weaving grand narratives about his power and destiny while manipulating those around him.
Warned of a coming cataclysm, Morrigan chose not salvation—but escape. Through lichdom, he abandoned responsibility and embraced eternal freedom.
Now known as the Sovereign of the Maelstrom, Morrigan exists in decadent unlife, pursuing power, chaos, and domination over death itself.
You have four slender arms that can hold and manipulate objects, or be used to cast spells.
Only two may be used to wield weapons or shields at any time.

sheet.description: Four arms; only two usable for weapons/shields.

description.p: Your form is sustained entirely by necromantic will.
You are immune to effects that would reduce your maximum hit points, age you, or magically alter your form against your will.

sheet.description: Immune to max HP reduction, aging, and forced transformation.

description.p: You are an undead creature.
Damage Immunities: Cold, Lightning, Necrotic, Poison.
Condition Immunities: Charmed, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned.
Additional Immunities (3E Lich): You are immune to polymorph effects (though you may choose to be affected by polymorph effects you cast on yourself) and all mind-affecting effects.
You do not have a Constitution score.

sheet.description: Undead. Immune: cold, lightning, necrotic, poison. Immune: charmed, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, exhaustion. Immune to polymorph (self-exception) and mind-affecting effects.

description.p: Your maximum hit points can't be reduced by any means.

sheet.description: Your maximum hit points can't be reduced.

description.p: Legendary Action Uses: 3 (4 in Lair).
Immediately after another creature's turn, the lich can expend a use to take one of the following actions.
Deathly Teleport. Teleport 60 ft; nearby creatures take necrotic damage.
Disrupt Life. AoE necrotic damage.
Frightening Gaze. Cast Fear.
As an action, charm all summoned creatures within 120 ft (DC 18 Wis, 1 min).
If destroyed, you reform in 1d10 days as long as your phylactery exists.
You regain all hit points upon reforming.

sheet.description: Reform in 1d10 days if phylactery survives.

description.p: 4/day (5 in lair), if you fail a saving throw, you can choose to succeed instead.
Creatures within 60 feet must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened.
Melee Spell Attack: 3d6 cold damage + paralyzed.
